gobos.arrow-slit:
name: Arrow Slit
description: Narrow vertical defensive loophole — a thin sliver of light on the floor.
pattern: slats
density: 1
orientation: vertical
gobos.ceiling-grate:
name: Ceiling Grate
description: 4x4 overhead grate. Reserved for future ceiling-projection mode — not yet used by any prop.
pattern: grid
density: 4
gobos.cruciform:
name: Cruciform
description: Cross-shaped arrow loop — a Latin cross cut through the wall.
pattern: cross
density: 1
gobos.diamond-lattice:
name: Diamond Lattice
description: Leaded diamond-paned window — crisscross bars cast a tight diagonal lattice.
pattern: diamond
density: 6
gobos.double-hung:
name: Double-Hung Window
description: Four-pane double-hung window, 2×2 grid of sashes.
pattern: grid
density: 3
gobos.horizontal-clerestory:
name: Horizontal Clerestory
description: High horizontal band of windows divided by a single transom.
pattern: slats
density: 2
orientation: horizontal
gobos.horizontal-slats:
name: Horizontal Slats
description: Horizontal blinds, louvered shutters, ladder rungs.
pattern: slats
density: 6
orientation: horizontal
gobos.leaded-grid:
name: Leaded Grid
description: Dense leaded-glass window — many small square panes, fine grid shadow.
pattern: grid
density: 10
gobos.narrow-casement:
name: Narrow Casement
description: Two-pane casement window with a single central mullion.
pattern: grid
density: 2
gobos.portcullis-window:
name: Portcullis Window
description: Heavy vertical iron bars behind the opening — prison or fortress window.
pattern: slats
density: 4
orientation: vertical
gobos.rose-window:
name: Rose Window
description: Radial diamond pattern cast by a rose window's spoked tracery.
pattern: diamond
density: 4
gobos.tall-lancet:
name: Tall Lancet
description: Cathedral-style tall narrow windows divided by slender vertical mullions.
pattern: slats
density: 3
orientation: vertical
gobos.vertical-bars:
name: Vertical Bars
description: Tall vertical slats — prison bars, portcullis, balcony rails.
pattern: slats
density: 6
gobos.window-mullions:
name: Window Mullions
description: Six-pane window grid cast by a mullioned wall window.
pattern: grid
density: 6
